title: oh joy!
excerpt: Jamie, Jack and I had such a great time celebrating Oh Joy’s newest book at West Elm a couple of weeks ago. You can also see Oh Joy's wrap up here . Jack loved having ice cream for the first…
body:
Jamie, Jack and I had such a great time celebrating Oh Joy’s newest book at West Elm a couple of weeks ago. You can also see Oh Joy's wrap up here.

Jack loved having ice cream for the first time, and it was my first time trying Jeni's. We ate it on one of the beds, which I think usually you're not even allowed to sit on. But it was a total treat and it was the same night we kept him out past his bedtime, but it was worth it. He also danced a bit and wanted to give the DJ's a fist bump for being so awesome.

Though I haven't had much time to check out the book, Oh Joy! 60 Ways to Create and Give Joy, at first glance, it looks super colorful and delightful!
